traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.description: Can move through spaces as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

actions.name: Thread Lash
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Entangle
actions.description: One creature within 5 ft. must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity save or be restrained by threads until the end of its next turn.

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.description: While motionless, indistinguishable from a normal object of its type.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Magic Scent
traits.description: Can detect magical auras within 120 ft.

traits.name: Weave Drain
traits.description: When the Thread-eater hits a creature concentrating on a spell, the creature has disadvantage on the concentration save.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Thread-eater makes two claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Consume Ward
actions.description: Targets a magical effect within 5 feet. The effect must succeed on a DC 13 check (1d20 + the effect's spell level) or be dispelled. The Thread-eater regains 10 HP.

name: Frayed One
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Incorporeal Flicker
traits.description: At the start of each of its turns, can choose to become partially incorporeal until start of next turn. While flickering, can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain. Takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

actions.name: Fray Touch
actions.description: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) necrotic damage. Target must succeed on DC 12 Constitution save or gain 1 Fray exposure level.

actions.name: Wail
actions.description: Each creature within 30 feet that can hear the Frayed One must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom save or be Frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the save at end of each of its turns.

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Time Stutter
traits.description: Can use its bonus action to teleport up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Hollow Walker makes three claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Unravel
actions.description: One creature within 30 feet must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) force damage on a failed save, or half on success. On failure, target's AC is reduced by 2 until end of its next turn.

name: The Unspun
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.description: Can move through spaces as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

traits.name: Weave Hunger
traits.description: At the start of its turn, if a magical effect or ward is within 30 feet, the Unspun must move toward it.

traits.name: Absorb Magic
traits.description: When targeted by a spell, can use its reaction to absorb the spell (spell has no effect). Regains HP equal to 5 × the spell's level.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) force damage.

actions.name: Engulf
actions.description: One Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity save or be engulfed. Engulfed creature is restrained, has total cover from outside, takes 10 (3d6) force damage at start of each Unspun's turns. Escape with DC 14 Strength check as action.
